'''''Star Wars Rebels: Rebel Strike''''' is a free online ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]'' browser [[Star Wars video games|game]] developed by [[Disney Interactive]]. The game was released on [[Wikipedia:Disney.com|Disney.com]] on [[October 9]], [[2014]].<ref name="Release" /> It features the [[Spectres]].<ref name="Disney.com" />

==Opening crawl==
{{OpeningCrawl
|name=Star Wars Rebels: Rebel Strike
|text=The planet Lothal is under strict
control under by the Galactic Empire.
New trade routes and mining operations
bring prosperity to the upper class, while
average citizens suffer. The crew of the
GHOST, lead by Kanan Jarrus and Hera
Syndulla has begun fighting for the freedom
of Lothal. Their small attacks slip through
the large grasp of the Empire. Pursued by
Commandant Aresko and Taskmaster Grint,
these young Rebels work to sabotage the
Empire's military and industry at every turn…}}

==Plot summary==
The [[Spectres|crew]] of the [[starship]] ''[[Ghost]]'' decided to conduct strikes against the [[Galactic Empire]]. They were pursued by [[Commandant]] [[Cumberlayne Aresko]]. The crew destroyed Imperial armaments and stole supplies in [[Capital City]] before attacking [[Myles Grint|Grint]] himself.<ref name="Disney.com" />

==Gameplay==
The game has an overhead view and control is turn-based, with each character getting two actions per turn. Each of the rebels are upgradeable with [[Galactic Credit Standard|credits]] earned during the mission.<ref name="Disney.com" />
